title: Fix blog post display, add inline image upload, and restore green theme

requirements.text: Debug and fix why uploaded blog posts are not displaying on the blog listing page and ensure all published posts appear correctly

quotes: why my blog posts which I have uploaded not showing

acceptanceCriteria: All uploaded blog posts with published status are visible on the blog listing page
Blog posts display with correct title, excerpt, image, and metadata
Posts are accessible via their individual detail pages

requirements.text: Add image upload functionality within the blog post rich text editor to allow inserting images in the middle of blog post content

quotes: can you create upload image option in the middle of my blog post

acceptanceCriteria: Rich text editor (ReactQuill) includes an image upload button in the toolbar
Users can upload images and insert them at any position within the blog post content
Uploaded images are stored properly and display correctly in both editor and published post view
Image uploads integrate with existing blob storage system

requirements.text: Restore the website color scheme to green theme as it appeared in earlier versions, replacing the current blue-green palette

quotes: can you make look of my website like earlier as green

acceptanceCriteria: Primary color palette uses green tones instead of blue-green
All UI components (buttons, cards, badges, links) reflect the green theme
Both light and dark mode variants use appropriate green color values
Theme colors are consistently applied across all pages

constraints: Preserve blob storage architecture using MixinStorage
Do not modify immutable frontend paths (useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui)
nonGoals: Changing the overall layout or structure of blog pages
Adding new blog post features beyond inline images
